title: psacalium amplum
intro: Psacalium amplum, also known as Hierba de la Reina, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The root and leaves of Psacalium amplum contain flavonoids and other compounds that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting infections. Psacalium amplum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
